description_long: This is a white, futuristic-looking military jet airplane with a wide, swept wing design and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are mid-mounted and feature prominent red star insignias, suggesting a Soviet or Russian origin. The aircraft has two large jet engines mounted under the wings, with visible exhausts at the rear. The tail section is distinctive, with a single vertical stabilizer and a sharply angled horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with a blue-tinted canopy and detailed window markings. The overall surface is smooth and hard, with subtle panel lines and a matte finish.
description: A white, swept-wing military jet with red star insignias, dual underwing engines, and a streamlined fuselage with a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, swept wings, dual engine intakes, and the pointed nose with a blue-tinted cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the mid-mounted wings, underwing engines, and the red star insignias on the wing and fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhausts, single vertical stabilizer, and the full wingspan with red star markings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit windows, wing configuration, and tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept wing with moderate anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and sharply angled horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and multiple window panels.
